[c0balt]

abstraction is a weapon. use it.

polyglot infrastructure. 9 languages. 11 layers.

// the logs (2am brain dumps)

id title when what
0x0-genesis log 0x00: the genesis 03/11/2025 0x1-nexus-init log 0x01: nexus — the first spark 04/11/2025 0x2-nexus-first-grind log 0x02: the first grind 02/12/2025 0x3-nexus-restart log 0x03: the pivot 23/12/2025 0x4-pyprobe-init log 0x04: pyprobe — memory introspection from scratch 28/02/2026 0x5-pyprobe-docs log 0x05: pyprobe — cleaning up the chaos 28/02/2026 0x6-pyjx-init log 0x06: pyjx — the python-java bridge 01/03/2026 0x7-pyprobe-extractors log 0x07: pyprobe — full type support and infrastructure 27/03/2026 0x8-nexus-resurface log 0x08: nexus resurfaces 11/04/2026 0x9-github-deploy log 0x9: the great github actions debacle 11/04/2026

"they said it was impossible.

i said their imagination was limited by their window manager."

> abstraction is a weapon
